name: znetwork_unregister_packet_handler
description: zNetwork::UnregisterPacketHandler removes dispatch-handler records matching the packet type and handler while preserving nonmatching entries.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?UnregisterPacketHandler@zNetwork@@YIHHP6IHHPAUzNetworkPacketHeader@@@Z@Z at 0x48c120 still fails: 196 unmasked mismatches, 16 relocation bytes masked, 2 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 214 bytes, VC object symbol size 96 bytes.
The native shutdown smoke verifies removal of the packet-1 color-assignment handler and dispatch-list count/link updates.
